package.name: r2d3_model
package.description:
Participant-facing template package for R2D3 V1 Isaac Sim submissions. Provides a ROS2 Lifecycle Node that hosts the RunTask action server, subscribes to /r2d3/observations, and dispatches to a Python policy class chosen via the `policy` parameter (à la aic_model).
Participants implement their solution by subclassing r2d3_model.policy.Policy and pointing the `policy` parameter at their module.
